## User Outcome

Describe the user entry, action, visible result, and failure behavior.

## State And Compatibility

Identify changed public APIs, CLI JSON, schemas, managed assets, Skills, or
templates. Include a migration and rollback path for canonical state changes.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Packed artifact tested in a temporary Git repository
- [ ] Commit or pull request delivery and final checkpoint exercised when the workflow changed
- [ ] User docs, agent Skills, Plugin metadata, and generated templates are aligned
- [ ] No `.opennori/` source-repository state or sensitive host data is included
